A two-tiered industrial metal cart with a dark gray frame, featuring black wheels and a handle on the left side. The top shelf holds four identical rectangular toolholder racks arranged side by side, each with multiple circular holes. The bottom shelf contains four more identical toolholder racks arranged in the same configuration. title: DUROCK Silent Linear Switches, Dolphin Keyboard Switches with 62g Gold Plated Spring, Classic Blue Patent Silent Stem 5 Pins Keyswitch for Mechanical Keyboards (Dolphin Linear Switch 62g, 110pcs)

variation_files.prompt: A close-up, angled overhead view of multiple keyboard switches arranged in neat, repeating rows on a light blue printed circuit board. The switches are mounted in a grid pattern, with visible solder points and metallic pins beneath each unit. The perspective creates a shallow depth of field, with the foreground switches in sharp focus and those receding into the background gradually softening. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the transparent housings and the blue stem components on top of each switch. The overall composition emphasizes uniformity, precision, and technical detail, set against a plain, light-colored surface with no text, logos, or additional graphic elements.

The man, wearing glasses and a red sweater over a checkered shirt, sits between the two children, smiling as they hold colorful 3D-printed toys. The girl on the left holds a pink and green figurine, while the boy on the right holds a yellow skeleton-like model. The table is scattered with numerous small, vibrant 3D-printed objects in various shapes and colors.
